meta.method: Score specialist (transformer_score_only.ckpt) forward over all 44 matches -> raw sigmoid; calibrated via Beta dense LUT. Per final-third combination (combo_wide_events is_f3==1, t3=completing pass): pre=mean p over [t3-3,t3], post=mean p over [t3+1,t3+10] (~2s), both on possession-stable same-team frames. Control = ordinary final-third possessor anchors (ball_x_norm>1/3, >5 frames from any combo, de-correlated) with the same windows. Control matched 1:1 to combos by nearest pre-event calibrated p_score. Delta in calibrated pp. Bootstrap 90% CI (paired, 5000 resamples) on combo-minus-matched-control.
